name: Employment Mediation Request Form
description: A formal application to initiate mediation for employment and labor disputes (e.g., severance pay, wrongful termination).
content:
TO THE MEDIATION AGENCY / BOARD

{{agency_name}}

APPLICANT (Employee/Employer):
Name: {{applicant_name}}
ID / SSN: {{applicant_id}}
Address: {{applicant_address}}
Phone: {{applicant_phone}}

RESPONDENT (Opposing Party):
Company/Name: {{respondent_name}}
Address: {{respondent_address}}

SUBJECT: Request for mandatory/voluntary mediation regarding an employment law dispute.

CLAIMS / RELIEF SOUGHT:

{{claims_summary}}

STATEMENT OF FACTS:

I was employed by the Respondent from {{formatDate employment_start_date}} to {{formatDate employment_end_date}}. Following the termination of my employment contract, the above-listed claims have arisen. I respectfully request the appointment of a mediator to resolve this dispute amicably prior to any formal litigation.

Date: {{formatDate application_date}}

Applicant Name: {{applicant_name}}


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: agency_name
fields.label: Name of Mediation Board / Court
fields.placeholder: e.g., National Labor Relations Board, Local Mediation Office

fields.name: claims_summary
fields.label: Summary of Claims
fields.placeholder: e.g., Unpaid severance, Unpaid overtime, Wrongful termination claim
